---
name: Feature or visualizer request
about: Suggest a new module, tool, or improvement
title: "[Idea] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The concept**
What topic or feature should this cover?

**Target audience**
Grade level and subject (e.g. Grade 9 Physics), and curriculum tie-in if any.

**What it should teach / do**
The interaction or insight you want students to come away with.

**References**
Any sources, simulations, or examples that would help.
